Configuration settings for Zephyr target in the JerryScript project, enabling console and libc features.

# Purpose
The configuration file enables and disables specific features in a software build. It sets `CONFIG_STDOUT_CONSOLE`, `CONFIG_NEWLIB_LIBC`, `CONFIG_FLOAT`, `CONFIG_CONSOLE_HANDLER`, and `CONFIG_CONSOLE_HANDLER_SHELL` to 'y', which means these features are enabled. The `CONFIG_ARC_INIT` is set to 'n', indicating that this feature is disabled.
